text: Office mein Boss sabke samne mujh par chillate hain aur unpaid overtime karate hain, par main bas 'Ji Sir' keh kar sir jhuka leti hoon. Udhar gaon mein kisan Papa ki fasal barbaad ho gayi hai aur bank ki EMI bounce hone wali hai, isliye main unhe naraz karke apni naukri risk mein nahi daal sakti. Agar main palat kar jawab doon toh ye meri parvarish par sawal hoga aur khandaan ki 'izzat' mitti mein mil jayegi.

Startup ka mahol itna toxic hai ki Boss roz zillat bhari baatein karte hain, par main unhe Guru maan kar sab seh raha hoon taaki career bana rahe. Ghar se khabar aayi hai ki baarish ne khet tabah kar diye aur loan ki installment nahi chuki, isliye meri bagawat parivaar ke liye paap jaisi hogi. Main chupchap unki har shart maan raha hoon taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho aur Papa ka samman bana rahe.

MNC mein Boss ne meeting mein meri capability par sawal uthaye, par main palat kar bahas nahi kar sakti kyunki unka ashirwad hi meri tarakki ka rasta hai. Fasal destroy hone ki wajah se ghar par economic crisis hai aur mere upar remittance ka bhari bojh hai, isliye main kalesh karke Papa ki tension nahi badhana chahti. Main bas apni self-respect daba kar kaam kar rahi hoon taaki parivaar ki 'naak' bachi rahe.

WFH isolation mein Boss ki screaming calls se darr lagta hai, par main unhe hamesha samman deti hoon kyunki unhone mujh jaisi first-gen professional ko mauka diya. Gaon mein loan installment na bhar paane ka dukh hai, aur agar main Boss se ulajh gayi toh ye mere bade-buzurgo ke sanskaron ke khilaaf hoga. Main apni saari takleef nigal leti hoon taaki sasural aur maike mein sabko mujh par garv rahe.

Tier-2 city ke is office mein Boss roz unpaid extra hours ki demand karte hain, par main unke aage zubaan nahi chalati taaki meri image ek 'shaleen' bahu aur beti ki bani rahe. Udhar khet mein nuksan hone se bank walo ke phone aa rahe hain, isliye meri ek galti pura rishta kharab kar sakti hai. Main bas unki gulamiyat kar rahi hoon taaki khandaan ki maryada aur unka samman bana rahe.
